summary: Modal Consolidation Phase 2 Testing - InvoiceDetailModal compact mode successfully tested across multiple pages. All 14 migrated files now use InvoiceDetailModal with compact={true} prop instead of the old SaleDetailModal.

SalesPage.details: Compact modal opens correctly when clicking sale row. Shows invoice number, action bar, print buttons, verify/edit buttons, items table, totals, payment history, void button.

SalesPage_CreditSale.details: Edit and Void buttons visible on credit/open sales. Edit mode shows editable items with qty/price inputs, sale date picker, reason input. Void dialog shows reason and PIN inputs.

PaymentsPage.details: Compact modal opens when clicking invoice link in customer invoices table.

CustomersPage.details: Compact modal opens when clicking invoice link (INT-B1-001001) in Account History modal.

ReportsPage_ARaging.details: Compact modal opens when clicking invoice link (SI-B1-001034) in expanded customer row.

QuickSearch.details: Compact modal opens when clicking search result from Ctrl+K quick search.

PendingReleasesPage.details: Compact modal opens when clicking invoice link (SI-B1-001034) in pending releases table.

FindTransactionPage.details: Compact modal opens when clicking search result. Shows all compact mode elements.

DashboardPage.details: No recent sale links found on dashboard to test. May require specific data setup.

CloseWizardPage.details: Requires branch selection and active close process to test. Page shows 'Please select a branch first to run the Close Wizard.'

compact_mode_elements_verified.sale-verify-btn: PASS - Verify button (visible on unverified sales)
compact_mode_elements_verified.sale-edit-btn: PASS - Edit button (visible on open/credit sales)
compact_mode_elements_verified.sale-void-btn: PASS - Void Sale button (visible on open/credit sales)
compact_mode_elements_verified.sale-void-dialog: PASS - Void dialog with reason and PIN inputs

success_rate.frontend: 100% (8/8 tested pages passed, 2 pages require specific data/state)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Modal Consolidation Phase 2 complete. InvoiceDetailModal compact mode is working correctly across all tested pages. The compact prop renders a single-view layout matching the old SaleDetailModal. The saleId prop works as backward-compat alias for invoiceId. SaleDetailModal.js is now orphaned with zero imports.
